final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a cozy cat daily scene.

Style/medium: needs a "治愈系" (healing/wholesome) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the cat resting on a windowsill as the focal point, window framing the outdoor view
Subject: must include an orange tabby cat (one), fluffy fur texture
Scene/backdrop: must include a snowy winter street view outside the window, warm indoor setting inside
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, cozy atmosphere with soft sunlight — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-cool contrast direction (warm interior vs. cool winter exterior) — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: must include fluffy/furry surface treatment — exact softness level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
